here's where we get the money out right well cash flow engineering is when you know this we use this money that comes out and we feed it back in here so we keep feeding this money around in a loop here right and what we do is we want to work really hard to reduce the cash flow cycles to less than 30 days and that means from when we put a dollar in we want to make sure that the dollar's coming out within 30 days so dollar in dollar comes out within 30 days and we're trying to get at least two to one ROI so we put a dollar in 30 days goes by we get two out and ideally it should be a shorter time frame dollar in two dollars out dollar in two dollars out and less than 30 days time frame here and here I explain cash flow engineering so you want to reduce the cash flow cycles to less than 30 days and then use a credit card to float the ad spend and this way your cash reserves remain untouched and all spend goes on credit but is paid back by day 30 at a 0 interest rate but with an ROI interest rate of 200 plus so let me explain this this is really a huge secret so if you've got a funnel and it's proven and you just know this process is proven right and you know it's proven because you've done it and you're absolutely confident in it you've been tracking your numbers you just know it well then you can track well how long does it take for me to spend the money and get it back we can calculate these cash flow cycles and if your cash flow cycle is less than 30 days that means you can put a credit card into facebook and now instead of it using your cash out of your bank account it's using credit on a credit card so it's not touching your cash so you can still hold your cash for living on and emergencies and all that stuff but what's feeding your ad spend is credit which is just paper but we have to pay for it when it hits the end of its credit card cycle right so we use it and then the credit card cycle comes up in say 30 days and if we pay the credit card bill on time on its cycle it's 0 interest and we get the points too which is a bonus so we don't pay any interest to the bank for using the credit card it's free money provided we pay it within the 30 days so we want to make sure that our cash flow cycle really is within 30 days we don't want to be stupid here if it's outside of 30 days well now we're going to pay interest and if it's not paying back at all well now we're just going to get ourselves into a lot of trouble so you really got to be honest with yourself don't go and start leveraging this thing up until you absolutely know that the money's activity that makes money and then we get our money out and then we pay the bill 0 interest and then we get our ROI which is 200 so we're gaming the system we're making 200 ROI on money that isn't even ours that is the ultimate cash flow engineering how to use money that isn't yours to make a 200% ROI this is how it's done and it is extremely powerful so how to use cash flow engineering to scale so the first step is to test your ads and funnel over and over again iterating and improving everything until the KPIs are well within the student benchmark range and ROI is at least two to one or three to one and this absolutely must be done first non-negotiable must be done first the next step is to determine your cash flow cycle period and this is the average amount of time it takes to liquidate your ad spend from the day it's spent for example if you spent 300 dollars today on ad spend how long till that 300 dollars comes back calculate it what is your cash flow cycle is it 40 days 30 days 60 days 50 days 10 days what is it and you want to be extremely confident in your numbers and KPIs and keep iterating and improving until you have a cash flow cycle that's less than 30 days and the shorter the better because the shorter we're able to liquidate our money the better because we're going to have way better awareness and you know we're going to be able to always have the cash on hand so we're never really risking much and when you have a cash flow cycle within 30 days and you have confidence in your numbers and KPIs it's time to start using a credit card to fund the ad spend and the reason why we use a credit card is because this isn't you know our cash and it's basically you know free money to float this thing with provided we pay it back before you know before it starts accruing interest and so we don't want to just dive in and just start you know cranking this thing up crazy we want to start increasing it slowly and measuring ROI and cycles to make sure that
